creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: vg
Date: Thu Nov 14 21:17:27 2013
New Revision: 333794
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333794

Log:
  - Update to 0.17.2
  - Removed client patch because contained at that version
  
  PR:		ports/183969
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Deleted:
  head/sysutils/py-salt/files/patch-salt__client____init__.py
Modified:
  head/sysutils/py-salt/Makefile
  head/sysutils/py-salt/distinfo
  head/sysutils/py-salt/pkg-plist

Modified: head/sysutils/py-salt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-salt/Makefile	Thu Nov 14 21:16:47 2013	(r333793)
+++ head/sysutils/py-salt/Makefile	Thu Nov 14 21:17:27 2013	(r333794)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	salt
-PORTVERSION=	0.17.1
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	0.17.2
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

Modified: head/sysutils/py-salt/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-salt/distinfo	Thu Nov 14 21:16:47 2013	(r333793)
+++ head/sysutils/py-salt/distinfo	Thu Nov 14 21:17:27 2013	(r333794)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (salt-0.17.1.tar.gz) = 2f9f0e8b2ed53241ab3e373fd8d4030384b3f78f7b796d185c9907874cceebb9
-SIZE (salt-0.17.1.tar.gz) = 3800422
+SHA256 (salt-0.17.2.tar.gz) = f1339c02c40b8aa9c55db66bd5780037aa7f6eb4d592fa9e1353e74d1ab167b2
+SIZE (salt-0.17.2.tar.gz) = 1866629

Modified: head/sysutils/py-salt/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-salt/pkg-plist	Thu Nov 14 21:16:47 2013	(r333793)
+++ head/sysutils/py-salt/pkg-plist	Thu Nov 14 21:17:27 2013	(r333794)
@@ -207,6 +207,8 @@ bin/salt-syndic
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/salt/modules/hg.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/salt/modules/hosts.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/salt/modules/hosts.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/salt/modules/htpasswd.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/salt/modules/htpasswd.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/salt/modules/img.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/salt/modules/img.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/salt/modules/iptables.py
